A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MANIT Bhopal Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering, Information and Technology, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, Master of Computer Applications or equivalent in relevant specializations. Preference will be given to candidates having experience in Deep Learning, Machine Learning, Python Programming, Data Analytics, or related areas.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MANIT Bhopal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview, and candidates should attend the interview on 24 July 2026. There is no separate application deadline before the walk-in date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering, Information and Technology, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, or Master of Computer Applications or equivalent in relevant specializations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 32 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 20,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the MANIT Bhopal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates are advised to be prepared for the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. Specific documents like ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates are also required.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for MANIT Bhopal JRF recruitment going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal), Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, 462003.

faq.question: Q9. Does MANIT Bhopal offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules. Candidates belonging to reserved categories should check the official notification for specific details.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position is on a contractual basis.
